# Cook Flooring & Tile

> Father-and-son flooring, tile, and deck contractor serving all of Rhode Island. Hardwood installation and refinishing, bathroom and shower tile, luxury vinyl plank, and decks. Free in-home estimate with a written quote within 24 hours. Licensed and insured in RI. Based in Cranston.

## What we do
- Hardwood floor installation (solid and engineered: red oak, white oak, maple, prefinished)
- Hardwood floor refinishing (sand, stain, seal)
- Bathroom and shower tile (surrounds, floors, niches, backsplashes) with full waterproofing
- Luxury vinyl plank (LVP) and engineered wood — waterproof, click-lock
- Deck building (pressure-treated, cedar, composite) with stairs, railings, and lighting

## Service pages
- Hardwood floor installation in Rhode Island: https://cookflooring.com/services/hardwood-floor-installation-ri/
- Hardwood floor refinishing in Rhode Island: https://cookflooring.com/services/floor-refinishing-ri/
- Bathroom and shower tile installation in Rhode Island: https://cookflooring.com/services/bathroom-tile-installation-ri/
- Deck building and deck repair in Rhode Island: https://cookflooring.com/services/deck-builder-ri/
- Luxury vinyl plank installation in Rhode Island: https://cookflooring.com/services/lvp-installation-ri/

## Service area
All of Rhode Island, based in Cranston. Towns include Providence, Cranston, Warwick, East Greenwich, North Kingstown, Johnston, Coventry, West Warwick, Smithfield, Cumberland, Barrington, Bristol, Narragansett, and Westerly. No travel fee inside Rhode Island.

## Key facts
- Owner-operated, two-person family crew; the people who quote the job build it.
- Licensed and insured in Rhode Island.
- Free in-home estimate; written, itemized quote within 24 hours; text reply within the hour.
- Typical hardwood installation: roughly $6–$12 per square foot installed (varies by wood, subfloor, layout).
- Most jobs schedule within one to three weeks.
